title: Zuri's New Friend
synopsis: Zuri feels nervous about making new friends at the playground until she meets Maya, a shy girl who loves the swings. Together they discover that friendship grows through sharing, kindness, and including others in their fun.

chapters.title: A New Day at the Playground

pages.text: Zuri walked to the playground with her mom. The sun was bright and warm. Birds were singing in the trees. "I hope I make a new friend today," Zuri said softly.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes walking hand in hand with her mother toward a colorful playground with swings, slides, and other children playing in the background under a bright sunny sky with primary colors
illustration.alt: Zuri and her mom walking to a sunny playground

pages.text: The playground was full of children laughing and playing. Some kids were going down the big red slide. Others were climbing on the monkey bars. Zuri felt a little nervous.

illustration.description: A busy playground scene with diverse children playing on red slides, monkey bars, and equipment while Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes stands watching with a slightly nervous expression, bright primary colors and white space around
illustration.alt: Children playing at a busy playground while Zuri watches

pages.text: "Don't worry, sweetheart," Mom said with a smile. "Just be yourself. You are kind and fun. The right friend will see that." Mom gave Zuri a gentle hug.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes receiving a warm hug from her mother at the edge of the playground, with other children playing joyfully in the background, bright sunny colors
illustration.alt: Mom hugging Zuri encouragingly at the playground

pages.text: Zuri took a deep breath. She walked toward the swings. Maybe she could start there. The swings always made her feel happy and free when she soared through the air.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes walking confidently toward a row of colorful swings at the playground, with bright primary colors, white space, and a sunny cheerful atmosphere
illustration.alt: Zuri walking toward the playground swings

pages.text: At the swings, Zuri saw a girl sitting alone. The girl had long braids and looked a little sad. She was watching other kids play but not joining in.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes approaching a girl with long braids who sits alone on a swing looking shy, while other diverse children play energetically in the background, bright playground colors
illustration.alt: Zuri seeing a lonely girl at the swings

pages.text: "Hi!" Zuri said with a friendly wave. "I'm Zuri. Do you want to swing together?" The girl looked up with surprise. "I'm Maya," she said quietly. "I don't know anyone here."

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes waving cheerfully at Maya who has long braids, both standing near colorful swings with other diverse children playing in the background, bright primary colors and joyful atmosphere
illustration.alt: Zuri introducing herself to Maya at the swings

pages.text: "I don't know many kids here either," Zuri said. "But we know each other now! Come on, let's swing together. It's so much fun!" Maya smiled for the first time.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes and Maya both smiling and walking toward the swings together, with a bright sunny playground full of diverse children playing, primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya walking to the swings together, both smiling

pages.text: The two girls sat on swings next to each other. They pumped their legs and soared higher and higher. "This is amazing!" Maya laughed. "I love swinging!" Zuri grinned widely.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes and Maya swinging high on colorful swings, both laughing joyfully with their hair and clothes flowing in the breeze, bright sunny playground with primary colors
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya swinging together and laughing

pages.text: "Want to try the slide next?" Zuri asked. "We can race down together!" Maya nodded excitedly. "Yes! That sounds like so much fun!" The girls jumped off their swings.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes and Maya jumping off their swings with excited expressions, looking toward a colorful slide, playground full of diverse children playing, bright energetic colors
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya jumping off swings, excited to play more

pages.text: Zuri and Maya climbed up the tall slide together. "Ready?" Zuri called out. "One, two, three!" They whooshed down at the same time, giggling all the way to the bottom.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes and Maya sliding down a bright red slide side by side, both laughing with joy, other diverse children playing around the playground equipment, primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya sliding down together, laughing happily

pages.text: "That was awesome!" Maya said, catching her breath. Just then, they noticed a little boy sitting by himself near the sandbox. He looked lonely too.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes and Maya standing together looking toward a small boy sitting alone by a sandbox, with other children playing in the background, bright playground scene with inclusive atmosphere
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya noticing a lonely boy by the sandbox

pages.text: "Should we ask him to play with us?" Zuri whispered to Maya. Maya smiled and nodded. "Yes! Everyone should have friends to play with." They walked over to the little boy together.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes and Maya walking hand in hand toward the little boy by the sandbox, with a bright sunny playground full of diverse children playing, primary colors and joyful energy
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya walking together toward the lonely boy

pages.text: "Hi there! I'm Zuri and this is Maya. Do you want to play with us?" The boy's face lit up. "Really? I'm Sam! I'd love to play!" Now there were three friends.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, Maya, and Sam all smiling together by the sandbox, with other diverse children playing throughout the bright sunny playground, primary colors and inclusive friendship atmosphere
illustration.alt: Zuri, Maya, and Sam meeting and becoming friends

pages.text: The three friends played together all afternoon. They built sand castles, went down slides, and swung on swings. When it was time to go home, they made plans to meet again tomorrow.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, Maya, and Sam playing together at various playground activities - building in sand, by slides and swings, with other diverse children around, bright sunny playground with primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: The three friends playing together throughout the playground

pages.text: "Thank you for being so kind," Maya said to Zuri. "I was scared I wouldn't make any friends." "That's what friends do," Zuri replied. "We help each other and share our fun!"

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes giving Maya a friendly hug while Sam stands nearby smiling, all three children happy together at the playground with bright sunny colors and other diverse kids playing in background
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya hugging while Sam smiles nearby, all three friends happy

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: How did Zuri feel when she first arrived at the playground?
questions.explanation: Zuri felt nervous about making new friends, but her mom encouraged her to be herself.

questions.question: What was Maya doing when Zuri first saw her?
questions.explanation: Maya was sitting alone at the swings, looking sad and watching other kids play.

questions.question: What did Zuri and Maya do first together?
questions.explanation: Zuri invited Maya to swing together, which was their first activity as new friends.

questions.question: Who did the girls invite to join them later?
choices: Sam, a boy by the sandbox
questions.explanation: They noticed Sam sitting alone by the sandbox and invited him to play with them.

questions.question: What did the friends plan to do at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: The three friends made plans to meet at the playground again the next day to continue their friendship.
